rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods section as a direct source for constructing a key variable: the price index (actual net price divided by regular price). The citing authors also position their sales equation as similar to prior store-level scanner models including this study, and later use it as a benchmark when judging whether their elasticity estimates are reasonable. This goes beyond a passing literature-list mention because it informs specification and interpretation choices in the empirical model.
relation_description: The citing paper adopts methodological elements from the cited study, especially the price-index definition and scanner-model conventions, and uses it as an empirical benchmark for elasticity magnitudes. It applies these elements in a different substantive setting focused on innovation-driven market-structure dynamics.
